---
output: github_document
bibliography: bib/publications.bib
csl: harvard-cite-them-right-no-et-al.csl
nocite: |
  @browett2018frontiersingenetics,
  @mchugo2019humanheredity, 
  @mchugo2019frontiersingenetics, 
  @mchugo2019bmcbiology,
  @hall2021bmcgenomics,
  @dover2021irishjournalofmedicalscience
---

[![Combined figures from Galway sheep publication](https://github.com/GillianMcHugo/GillianMcHugo/blob/main/Media/Combined_Galway_header.gif)](https://doi.org/10.3389/fgene.2019.00927)

## [Gillian McHugo](https://gillianmchugo.github.io) :cow2::dna::computer:

Computational biology PhD researcher at [University College Dublin](https://www.ucd.ie) studying integrative genomics of infectious diseases in cattle, focusing on trypanosomiasis in hybrid African cattle and bovine tuberculosis in Irish cattle.

### Publications

<div id="refs"></div>
```{r, include = F}
# Install and load package
if (!require(stringi)) install.packages("stringi")
library(stringi)

# Read, edit and write README
README <- readLines("GillianMcHugo.md")

README <- stri_replace_all_regex(
  README,
  pattern = c("McHugo, G.P.",
              "McHugo, G.,",
              "Mycobacterium",
              "bovis",
              "tuberculosis"),
  replacement = c("**McHugo, G.P.**",
                  "**McHugo, G.**,",
                  "*Mycobacterium*",
                  "*bovis*",
                  "*tuberculosis*"),
  vectorize = F)

writeLines(README, "README.md")
```

*A full list is available on my [website](https://gillianmchugo.github.io) and [ORCID.](https://orcid.org/0000-0001-6920-0041)*
